task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' paragraph style to the required section titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text for 'Introduction', 'Equipment Schedule', 'Maintenance Procedures', and 'Emergency Contacts' appears styled as a primary heading (larger, bolded). The word processor's style indicator (e.g., toolbar or styles pane) should show 'Heading 1' when these titles are selected.

task_completion.description: Format the 'Equipment Schedule' section in landscape orientation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page containing the 'Equipment Schedule' (which features a wide 10-column table) is visibly wider than it is tall, indicating landscape orientation.

task_completion.description: Keep the 'Introduction' and 'Maintenance Procedures' sections in portrait orientation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pages before and after the 'Equipment Schedule' (containing the 'Introduction' and 'Maintenance Procedures' sections) are visibly taller than they are wide, indicating portrait orientation. The document should show a clear mix of portrait and landscape pages.

task_completion.description: Include page numbers in the footer of every page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Page numbers are visible at the bottom of the pages within the footer area.

task_completion.description: Save the reformatted document as maintenance_plan_formatted.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor's title bar displays 'maintenance_plan_formatted.docx', or a file manager/terminal shows this new file exists in the /home/ga/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a word processor application (like LibreOffice Writer) open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or scripts (like python-docx or pandoc) doing the work.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely changed page orientations using section breaks or page styles.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document view shows actual different page dimensions (portrait vs landscape) in the layout, not just zoomed-in views or rotated text.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's footer/page number feature rather than manually typing numbers at the bottom of the text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The page numbers appear in the distinct footer margin area of the document, often indicated by a separated footer box or grayed-out text when editing the main body.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The draft document is located at /home/ga/Documents/maintenance_plan_draft.docx and must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/maintenance_plan_formatted.docx. The required headings to be styled as 'Heading 1' are exactly: 'Introduction', 'Equipment Schedule', 'Maintenance Procedures', and 'Emergency Contacts'. The 'Equipment Schedule' section contains a wide 10-column table that necessitates the landscape orientation. The final document must have at least 3 sections to properly isolate the landscape page between the portrait pages.
